en_title: id Software Issues Statement Following Xbox Layoffs, Says It's Back to the Size It Was When It Made 2016's Doom
cn_title: id Software回应XBOX裁员：团队规模回到《毁灭战士》2016年时期
subtitle: 还没到末日
opus_summary: id Software回应XBOX裁员，称团队规模已回到制作2016年《毁灭战士》时的水平，仍有能力制作优秀游戏。工作室目前没有公布项目，但据报正在原型多个新作，包括《毁灭战士》合作项目。

paragraphs.en: id Software has issued a statement following layoffs at Xbox that saw roughly half the staff at the legendary first-person shooter studio lose their jobs.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX裁员导致这家传奇第一人称射击工作室约半数员工失业后，id Software发表了声明。

paragraphs.en: On Wednesday, a WARN notice filed in Texas reported by Game Developer confirmed that 96 workers had been laid off in Richardson, Texas, home of id Software, with a further 40 remote roles cut. The cuts were part of new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s “reset” of Microsoft’s gaming business, which began with 1,600 staff losing their jobs on Monday. Another 1,600 will be let go during the rest of the current financial year. Four Xbox studios are already out the door, with another hot on their heels.
paragraphs.cn: 周三，Game Developer报道的一份得州WARN通知确认，id Software所在地得州理查森有96名员工被裁，另有40个远程职位被取消。这些裁员是新任XBOX首席执行官Asha Sharma对微软游戏业务进行「重置」的一部分；本轮行动周一开始，已有1,600名员工失业，本财年剩余时间还将有另外1,600人被裁。四家XBOX工作室已经离场，另一家也紧随其后。

paragraphs.en: Some have expressed concern that id Software would be unable to lead development on any new games in its current state, and that it might be relegated to support studio status. But in a new statement issued to IGN, id Software said it was now at the staffing level it was back when it made the much-loved 2016 Doom reboot — and insisted it was still capable of making “great games.”
paragraphs.cn: 有人担心，按id Software目前的状况，工作室将无法主导新游戏开发，甚至可能沦为支援工作室。但在向IGN发表的新声明中，id Software表示，团队规模已经回到制作广受喜爱的2016年《毁灭战士》重启版时的水平，并坚称仍然有能力制作「优秀游戏」。

paragraphs.en: Here’s the statement in full, posted to id Software's X / Twitter page :
paragraphs.cn: 以下是id Software发布在X账号上的完整声明：

paragraphs.en: id and Xbox are also pushed back on the suggestion that there’s essentially no-one left at the company working on id Tech, the game engine it and fellow Bethesda-owned studio MachineGames uses to build their games (MachineGames is rumored to be working on Wolfenstein 3). Xbox confirmed to IGN that "there are dozens of people working on id Tech across multiple locations," and that previous reports that there was only one person left in Texas are "inaccurate."
paragraphs.cn: id Software和XBOX还反驳了「公司几乎没有人继续开发id Tech」的说法。id Software及同属贝塞斯达的MachineGames都使用这款游戏引擎制作游戏（据传MachineGames正在开发《德军总部3》）。XBOX向IGN确认：「有数十人在多个地点参与id Tech开发」，此前关于得州只剩一人的报道「并不准确」。

paragraphs.en: While id Software currently has no announced project, IGN understands that the studio is prototyping a number of potential projects, with the belief it is still capable of building its own games. According to GamesBeat , id was formulating new game ideas, such as a John Wick-style original IP, a new Perfect Dark game, and a multiplayer / co-op Doom game before the layoffs hit.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然id Software目前没有公布项目，但IGN了解到，工作室正在为多个潜在项目制作原型，相信自己仍有能力开发独立游戏。据GamesBeat报道，裁员前id正在构思新游戏，包括约翰·威克风格的原创IP、新版《完美黑暗》，以及多人/合作《毁灭战士》游戏。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda studios will collaborate more closely from now on, however, and, generally at Xbox, there is a focus on bigger franchises such as Halo, Minecraft, Candy Crush, Fallout, and The Elder Scrolls. As revealed by IGN, in an email to Bethesda staff sent following Sharma's memo on Monday , Bethesda boss Jill Braff said the layoffs and change in strategy “reflect the realities of our industry and business – and our responsibility to ensure Bethesda is operating from a more stable foundation.”
paragraphs.cn: 不过，贝塞斯达旗下工作室今后将展开更紧密的合作；总体而言，XBOX正把重点放在《光环》《我的世界》《糖果传奇》《辐射》和《上古卷轴》等更大的系列上。正如IGN披露的那样，贝塞斯达负责人Jill Braff在周一Sharma备忘录发出后给员工的邮件中表示，裁员和战略变化「反映了行业与业务的现实，也体现了我们确保贝塞斯达建立在更稳定基础上的责任」。

paragraphs.en: "To be successful in the future, we need to change course,” Braff continued. “We must strengthen our business, return to sustainable growth, and ensure we can continue investing in our franchises and our players. I know that doesn't make a day like today any easier.”
paragraphs.cn: Braff继续说道：「为了在未来取得成功，我们需要改变方向。必须强化业务，回到可持续增长轨道，并确保能够继续投资我们的系列和玩家。我知道，这并不会让今天这样的日子变得更容易。」

paragraphs.en: But what does that actually mean beyond layoffs at the likes of id Software, ZeniMax Online Studios, and elsewhere at Bethesda? Without naming games, Braff said “to best position Bethesda for future growth, we are shifting from a planning model primarily centered on what's next for each independent studio to one that focuses on our strongest franchises and determining the content roadmap that best serves our players and Bethesda as a whole.”
paragraphs.cn: 但除了id Software、ZeniMax Online Studios及贝塞斯达其他部门的裁员，这究竟意味着什么？Braff没有点名具体游戏，只说：「为了让贝塞斯达最有利地实现未来增长，我们正从主要围绕各独立工作室下一步计划的模式，转向聚焦最强系列，并确定最能服务玩家和贝塞斯达整体利益的内容路线图。」

paragraphs.en: “From there, we’ll align the right talent, technology, and resources across the organization to deliver on those priorities,” Braff added.
paragraphs.cn: Braff补充道：「接下来，我们会在整个组织内调配合适的人才、技术和资源，落实这些重点。」

paragraphs.en: id Software co-founders John Romero and John Carmack have both issued statements on the layoffs at the studio. John Romero took to social media to offer affected id Software staff his support , and to call on the studio’s recent legacy to be preserved. “Doom, Quake, and Wolfenstein are not easy names to carry on, especially in today’s industry,” he said. “The last few games showed real care, skill and respect for what those worlds mean to people.”
paragraphs.cn: id Software联合创始人John Romero和John Carmack都就工作室裁员发表了声明。John Romero在社交媒体上向受影响的id Software员工表示支持，并呼吁保留工作室近期的传承。他说：「《毁灭战士》《雷神之锤》和《德军总部》并不是容易延续的名字，尤其是在如今的行业环境中。最近几款游戏展现了对这些世界对玩家意义的真正关怀、技巧与尊重。」

paragraphs.en: Carmack, however, expressed sadness but not “anger or outrage," questioning whether id Software's games had sold well enough to prevent the layoffs .
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Carmack表达了悲伤，却没有「愤怒或愤慨」，并质疑id Software的游戏销量是否足以避免裁员。
